docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,706.00 FILED BY KOGAN, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT THOMSON, WILLIAM DBA THE THOMSON BUILDER GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOGAN, ALLEN
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-04-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED SEP-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMSON, WILLIAM DBA THE THOMSON BUILDER GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-21-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOGAN, ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THOMSON, WILLIAM DBA THE THOMSON BUILDER GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
